turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I'm trying to get an appointment for a general health checkup. Nothing specific, just an annual thing.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: That's a great practice! We offer comprehensive health checkup packages for adults. Dr. Mohan Gaikwad in general medicine handles these. He's available this Saturday morning.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Saturday works. What does the checkup include?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The standard annual package includes CBC, lipid profile, blood sugar fasting, liver and kidney function tests, thyroid, ECG, chest X-ray, and a doctor consultation. It's priced at ₹2,800.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That sounds reasonable. Book me in. Name's Anita Narayanan, 9944556677.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirmed! Anita Narayanan, annual health checkup with Dr. Mohan Gaikwad, this Saturday. Please come fasting — no food or water for at least 8 hours before. SMS on the way.
